title: FINOS AIR Control Requirement Schema
description: JSON Schema for FINOS AIR (AI Risks) Framework control requirements

control-id.description: Unique identifier for the AIR control (e.g., AIR-PREV-001)

category.description: Control category within the AIR framework

description.description: Detailed description of what the control addresses

reference-url.description: URL to the official AIR framework documentation for this control

threats-mitigated.description: AIR threat IDs this control helps mitigate

implementation-requirements.description: Specific technical requirements for implementing this control
